resultList.dtldesc: This sophisticated 2 BHK apartment in the prestigious Pride Aashiyana project, Adibatla, Hyderabad, offers a premium residential experience in a rapidly developing aerospace and IT hub. Spanning a generous super area of 1,110 sq. ft, this ready-to-move-in home is ideal for professionals and families seeking a blend of modern comfort and strategic location. The apartment is thoughtfully designed as a corner unit, ensuring superior natural light and ventilation throughout the day.::::Property Specifications::Situated on the third floor of a five-storey building, this east-facing apartment is designed according to vaastu principles to promote a harmonious living environment. The unfurnished layout provides a versatile 888 sq. ft of carpet area, featuring two spacious bedrooms and two modern bathrooms, one of which is attached to the master bedroom. The home includes two private balconies—one attached to the bedroom and another serving as a utility area for the kitchen—offering pleasant views of the surrounding open space. The interiors are finished with high-quality vitrified flooring, and the kitchen is equipped with a granite platform and sink, ready for customisation to suit personal tastes.::::Facilities::Residents of Pride Aashiyana benefit from a comprehensive range of facilities designed for a convenient and secure lifestyle. The property includes a dedicated covered parking space for a car and bike. Essential services are well-managed with 24-hour water supply from both borewell and corporation sources, along with a 100% power backup system for common areas. Security is a priority, featuring a dedicated security guard and CCTV surveillance monitoring the premises. Additionally, a modern lift provides easy access to all floors, and the community offers leisure amenities such as a clubhouse, gym, and a children's play area.::::Locality::Adibatla is one of Hyderabad’s most promising neighbourhoods, known for its proximity to major corporate hubs like the TCS Adibatla campus and the Tata Aerospace SEZ. The property is conveniently located near these landmarks, making it an excellent choice for employees working in the vicinity. The locality is well-served by essential social infrastructure, with reputable schools, hospitals, and shopping centres situated within easy reach. Excellent connectivity to the Outer Ring Road ensures a seamless commute to the international airport and other major parts of the city, providing a perfect balance of a peaceful residential setting and urban accessibility.
